member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.ITelemetryAwareTestMethod
member.summary: TestMethods telemetry control interface.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITelemetryAwareTestMethod.RegisterCurrentLogger
member.summary: Registers the current Instance logger in the session service. used only for TOS3.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITelemetryAwareTestMethod.UnregisterCurrentLogger
member.summary: Removes the current Instance logger from the session service. used only for TOS3.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITelemetryAwareTestMethod.CreateInstanceContextLogger(MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Creates the instance context logger, during every verify.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITelemetryAwareTestMethod.InnerExecute
member.summary: The instance inner execution itself, for telemetry wrapping. To be executed per die.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITelemetryAwareTestMethod.InnerPreExecute
member.summary: The instance inner pre execution itself, for telemetry wrapping. To be executed per die.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITelemetryAwareTestMethod.InnerPostExecute
member.summary: The instance inner post execution itself, for telemetry wrapping. To be executed per die.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITelemetryAwareTestMethod.InnerCustomPreVerify
member.summary: The instance inner custom pre verify itself, for telemetry wrapping. To be executed per die. Keeping this for backward compatibility.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITelemetryAwareTestMethod.InnerVerify
member.summary: The instance inner verify itself, for telemetry wrapping. To be executed per die.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITelemetryAwareTestMethod.InnerCustomVerify
member.summary: The instance inner custom verify itself, for telemetry wrapping. To be executed per die.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod
member.summary: The interface class for any Prime Test Method.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.SetInstanceParameters(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Set instance parameters.
member.param: pairs of parameter's name and value.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.PopulateTestMethodExtension
member.summary: Populate the Test Method ITME extension if exist.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.CustomPreVerify
member.summary: This will be executed right before the Test Method Verify function passed. User doing ITME can override this function custom pre verify his instance. Keeping this for backward compatibility.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.InitializeSessionContext(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initialize the instance's session context.
member.param: The kernel session object passed by ref.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.InitializeTelemetry(MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initialize the instance telemetry.
member.param: the global telemetry logger from the kernel.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.Verify
member.summary: Verify function of the Test Method Usually will be called once per instance unless some parameter were changed.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.VerifyCommonParams
member.summary: This will be executed right before the Test Method Verify function.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.CustomVerify
member.summary: This will be executed right after the Test Method Verify function passed User doing ITME can override this function to verify his instance parameters.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.CustomBypass
member.summary: This will be executed before the execute of the test method (also before pre-execute event if exist). User doing ITME can override this function to decide whether to bypass this instance execution.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.ForceReVerify
member.summary: This will give each test method the option to force it's own verify. According to the methodology implementation, user can decide what are the conditions in which the test method should be force verified and in these cases return true from this API.
member.returns: Should or should not the test method be force verified.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.Execute
member.summary: The instance execution itself To be executed per die.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.PreExecute
member.summary: Execute the pre-execute code defined by the target.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.PostExecute
member.summary: Execute the post-execute code defined by the target.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.Load
member.summary: This will be executed right after the Test Method object is created in loading.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.Unload
member.summary: Will be called by the kernel just before the instance is going to unloaded. This will allow the TM to make last minute cleanups if needed.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.RegisterCurrentSessionContext
member.summary: Registers the current SessionContext in the session service. used only for TOS3.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.UnregisterCurrentSessionContext
member.summary: Removes the current SessionContext from the session service. used only for TOS3.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.ITestMethod.PopulateTestInstanceProperties(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Populate the TestMethodBase properties after the instance was created.
member.param: global session id for Telemetry logger.
the dll name this TM reside in.
